articles.description: Watch and follow live coverage of Thomas Tuchel's England news conference before facing Japan in their final friendly before the World Cup squad is announced.
articles.title: Watch Tuchel news conference as England prepare for final friendly before WC squad announced

articles.description: Tottenham Hotspur want to convince Roberto de Zerbi to become their new permanent head coach, after the departure of interim boss Igor Tudor.
articles.title: Roberto de Zerbi: Tottenham want Italian as next permanent head coach

articles.description: Join the debate and have your say on whether you support the use of the video assistant referee or if you are against it.
articles.title: VAR in the Premier League: Are you for or against?

articles.description: A return to Formula 1 will be difficult for former Red Bull team principal Christian Horner because he has "broken quite a lot of glass", says ex-Mercedes rival Toto Wolff.
articles.title: Christian Horner return to F1 difficult - Toto Wolff

articles.description: Jannik Sinner creating history by adding the Miami Open title to his Indian Wells win will not be lost on world number one Carlos Alcaraz.
articles.title: Miami Open: Jannik Sinner wins title to keep pressure on Carlos Alcaraz in world rankings

articles.description: Fans believe VAR is ruining goal celebrations and has not improved football since its introduction, according to a Football Supporters' Association survey.
articles.title: VAR: FSA survey finds 75% of Premier League fans against system

articles.description: Four years ago Elliot Anderson was helping Bristol Rovers to League Two promotion - this summer he could be a key player for England at the World Cup. BBC Sport charts his rise.
articles.title: Nottingham Forest: Shades of Gazza - the rise of England's Eliot Anderson

articles.description: Northamptonshire head coach Darren Lehmann says England players do not play enough county cricket and selectors have overlooked talent in the domestic game.
articles.title: Darren Lehmann: England players do not play enough county cricket

articles.description: Chief executive Vinai Venkatesham and sporting director Johan Lange must get the next Tottenham appointment correct or else they could follow Igor Tudor, writes Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Igor Tudor leaves Tottenham Hotspur - what next for Spurs?

articles.description: F1 finds itself in something of a tangled web as it tries to refine the new rules, improve safety and ensure the drivers are happy without compromising racing.
articles.title: Japanese Grand Prix: What can sport's bosses do to help keep Max Verstappen in F1?
